articles.title: Olympic women's sport limited to biological females
articles.summary: The women's category of Olympic sports will be limited to biological females from 2028, says the International Olympic Committee.

articles.title: 'A game-changing moment for social media' - what next for big tech after landmark addiction verdict?
articles.summary: The ruling could be the beginning of the end of social media as we know it, writes the BBC's technology editor Zoe Kleinman.

articles.title: French court hands Islam scholar Tariq Ramadan 18-year jail term for rape
articles.summary: Ramadan, a 63-year-old former Oxford professor, denied the charges but his lawyers said he was too ill to attend the trial.

articles.title: Orban's Hungarian government accused of mass voter intimidation ahead of election
articles.summary: A film quoting voters, mayors and a police officer alleges money and drugs are being offered to pressure people to back the ruling party.

articles.title: Air Canada CEO 'deeply saddened' his poor French skills distracted from victims of crash
articles.summary: Michael Rousseau has faced calls to resign for not speaking French in his message after the LaGuardia crash, which killed two Air Canada pilots.

articles.title: Zimbabwe says 15 nationals killed after being lured to fight for Russia
articles.summary: Zimbabwe says it is engaging the Russian government to repatriate bodies and bring home those still alive.

articles.title: Russia bans Oscar-winning film 'Mr Nobody Against Putin'
articles.summary: A court alleges that the documentary promoted "negative attitudes" about the Russian government and the war in Ukraine.

articles.title: European Parliament gives conditional approval to EU-US trade deal
articles.summary: The agreement would see EU tariffs on US goods reduced to zero while US tariffs on EU imports set at 15%.

articles.title: Trump confirms May meeting with Xi Jinping as Iran war forces postponement
articles.summary: Trump's delayed meeting with Xi Jinping will be the first visit to China by a US president since 2017.
